payload.text: External corroboration of frontier difficulty: AlphaProof Nexus (DeepMind, arXiv 2605.22763, May 2026) attempted Erdős #307 (listed in erdos_problems_attempted.txt of google-deepmind/alphaproof-nexus-results@0647711a7118) and did not solve it (9 of 242 attempted Erdős problems solved). Their Lean formalization of the statement lives in google-deepmind/formal-conjectures. Treat as evidence the open obligations here are genuine, not low-hanging.
